north_star: Turn Shorts Feed spikes into a repeat audience that recognizes Wild Brief and comes back for the next animal signal.

bottlenecks.action: Reject any package whose first frame and first spoken line do not show animal, visible cue, and payoff.
Turn every strong Short into a named lane, sequel prompt, and pinned next-episode question.
Place the channel promise after the payoff: follow for one animal signal a day.
Add query-shaped titles and descriptions around animal behavior so winners can collect search/suggested traffic later.

operating_rules.rule: The first frame must contain the animal plus a concrete visual cue in 2-4 words.
operating_rules.why: Only 31.8% currently continue after the opening.

operating_rules.rule: One Short gets one promise, one mechanism, one payoff. Remove second facts.
operating_rules.why: The channel is still training viewers to understand the format instantly.

operating_rules.rule: Every publish-ready story must belong to a recurring lane or a measured experiment.
Subscriber CTA appears only after payoff and must promise the next animal signal.
operating_rules.why: Current subscriber conversion is 1.221 per 1,000 views.

operating_rules.rule: Winners get query-shaped metadata for animal + behavior + why/how searches.
operating_rules.why: YouTube Search is only 1.7% of discovery.

series_lanes.promise: familiar animals doing smarter things than viewers expect
one visible body cue that explains the next move
small cues before hunting, escape, or defense
underwater behavior decoded through a visible signal
home-animal behavior only when the hook beats retention gates

actions.title: Monkeys use their tail to signal

production_commands: Before rendering, run every candidate through a frame-zero rewrite: animal + visible cue + payoff.
Attach a named series lane and next-episode pinned question to every strong candidate.
For each winner, add one searchable title/description variant around animal behavior intent.
Use the next publish block to deepen: Farmyard Minds, Body Clues, Predator tells.
Create 3 sequel/remix prompts from high-retention winners before new broad discovery.
Remake 2 high-reach/low-retention openings instead of copying their old hooks.

milestone_path.job: Prove the channel promise converts strangers into followers.
Build recognizable lanes and sequel loops before scaling volume.
Scale only lanes that beat retention and conversion floors.
Compound format memory into a repeatable audience identity.
